subject: Action needed: round table planning in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-2145
body: Here is a progress summary for the round table plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Alexander Fleming as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-2145. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, risk.
